rows.label: qev024191_MSG0001
rows.name:
All of the xenoforms who have come
to this city have been good people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0002
rows.name:
All of them except for
the Orphe, that is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0003
rows.name:
I heard a rustling sound coming
from the garden earlier, and
went to see what it was...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0004
rows.name:
And what did I find? That Orphean, Ton'barac,
chowing down on the beautiful garden I'd
poured my heart into maintaining![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0005
rows.name:
His human friend apologized profusely for
his behavior, so I didn't report him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0006
rows.name:
But now I can't stop worrying about the possibility
that he might come back. I'm so stressed out, I'm
barely getting eight hours of sleep a night![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_JNK0010
rows.name: Enlighten[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_SEL0011
rows.name:
Explain that the Orphe
are no threat to humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_JNK0020
rows.name: Warn[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_SEL0021
rows.name:
Fan the flames by claiming
that Orpheans are dangerous.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Wait. You say they're working night
and day to make weapons for BLADE?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0008
rows.name:
...And that Ton'barac has become
an avid tennis player in an
attempt to understand humans...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmm... You know, I was in the
tennis club back in high school.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0010
rows.name:
Maybe I should invite
him to play sometime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hey, yeah! If we work up a little sweat
together, I bet he won't seem so scary![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0012
rows.name:
I guess I'd better go get my racket out
of storage, huh? Thanks for the advice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0013
rows.name:
I knew it! No decent creature could
so casually destroy a garden that
I'd put so much love into![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0014
rows.name:
I bet he and his compatriots
are plotting to team up and come
eat the rest of the plants![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0015
rows.name:
That settles it. I'm going to
go talk to Jim from the Companion
and have him stand guard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then I'll go stock up on bug
repellent so I'm ready to repel
Ton'barac's next attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev024191_MSG0017
rows.name:
I will protect my garden from any xenoform,
no matter how ferocious it may be![ST:wait ]
